zh.lifeSummary: 當Owen Donal O’Sullivan於1599年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波 卡素時，他的父親Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara29歲，母親Lady Helena Butler24歲。他於1625年與Joanne Elizabeth Browne在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1698年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 威廉享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owen Donal O’Sullivan于1599年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara29岁，母亲Lady Helena Butler24岁。他于1625年与Joanne Elizabeth Browne在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1698年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 威廉享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: O’Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabháin’ ( see Sullivan ).

variants.name: Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Donal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.
William of Orange (William III) lands at Carrickfergus and defeats James II at Battle of the Boyne.
Exclusion of Catholics from Parliament and all professions.

en.lifeSummary: When Owen Donal O’Sullivan was born in 1599, in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara, was 29 and his mother, Lady Helena Butler, was 24. He married Joanne Elizabeth Browne in 1625, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 July 1698, in Prince William, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owen Donal O’Sullivan est né en 1599, à Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Helena Butler, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joanne Elizabeth Browne en 1625, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1698, à Prince William, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 99 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owen Donal O’Sullivan è nato il nel 1599 nel Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Helena Butler, aveva 24 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Owen Donal O’Sullivan(이)가 1599년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Helena Butler(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1625년 아일랜드에서 Joanne Elizabeth Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1698년 7월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프린스 윌리엄에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joanne Elizabeth Browne em 1625, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owen Donal O’Sullivan родился в 1599 г. в местности дунбои кастл, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Helena Butler, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne Elizabeth Browne в 1625 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 июля 1698 г. в местности принц уиллам, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 99 лет.
